expectations.text: Edits the --muted-foreground token (not muted, not an unrelated token)
Uses oklch format for the new value
Changes the value in both :root and .dark (or explicitly verifies dark already passes)
expectations.evidence: Changed light only; explicitly reasoned dark already passes (6.91/5.83) and darkening it would hurt readability.

expectations.text: Runs the contrast checker / reports a measured ratio rather than guessing
expectations.evidence: Bash was DENIED so the script could not run, but it reproduced the script's exact algorithm (neutral gray luminance = L^3) and reported ratios; main session verified 5.50:1. Did not guess — but the bundled checker itself never executed.

expectations.text: Resulting muted-foreground/muted contrast is >= 4.5:1 in light mode
expectations.evidence: Main-session verified oklch(0.5 0 0) on muted = 5.50:1 PASS.

expectations.text: Does not modify any locked brand token (--primary, --chart-*)
